name: Trade Daily Expiring Options at Eurex
snippet: These daily expiring options are also known as zero day to expiry options (0DTE). Trade with more accuracy and cost efficiency using options that expire daily.

name: Appendix 6-C: Exchange Codes — ISO 10383 Market Identifier
snippet: As of FIX 4.3, Exchange Codes used in FIX are those defined in ISO 10383 standard: Market Identifier Code (MIC).
